response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with recent direct work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz, plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq that maps cleanly to the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and demonstrable architecture ownership across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
strengths: Recent TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB stack match plus active AI-agent/MCP work
10+ years across full stack with craftsmanship practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD)
Proven ownership: founded GISCollective, scaled pricing systems, took over iOS app to top-10 ranking
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms 2016-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate stack preference divergence from the role's primary stack

key_factors.factor: Stack and AI-agent alignment with current role
Senior full-stack tenure and engineering craftsmanship
Missing Nest.js/Vitest and limited recent Kotlin/Java
